papers_mined.title: Idrija lace (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Slovenian bobbin lace tradition since 1696; 40+ recognized motifs (peonies, hearts, cradles); each motif a topological signature of bobbin paths.

papers_mined.title: Bobbin lacemaking in Slovenia (UNESCO ICH)
papers_mined.note: UNESCO intangible heritage; pattern catalog with archival prickings; defect repair by re-routing individual bobbin crossings.

papers_mined.title: Idrija lace (Tina Koder)
papers_mined.note: Bands or finished shapes; locally recognizable patterns; pricking template specifies canonical crossings.
